packageRules.description: Never auto-merge packages that reshape the dependency graph (and thus pnpm hoisting). An @reddoorla/maintenance minor bump silently broke Netlify builds via an undeclared transitive sharp (fleet sharp fixes, 2026-06): GitHub Actions built green while Netlify failed. Require a human + a green Netlify deploy preview before these merge.

Hold pnpm (packageManager) at 11.8.x: pnpm/action-setup's self-installer crashes bootstrapping any pnpm >=11.9 target ('self-installer exits with code 1' / 'Cannot use in operator to search for integrity in undefined'), breaking CI fleet-wide (2026-07). Only non-major pnpm bumps are held here; MAJOR pnpm updates and vulnerabilityAlerts still open PRs so the operator is notified for a manual fleetwide bump. Remove when action-setup/corepack reliably installs pnpm >=11.9.
